title: Severe Bottleneck at Turnstiles
description: High density at South Gate turnstiles due to digital ticket scanning slow-down. Crowd backing up into outer plazas.

title: Minor Heat Exhaustion Case
description: An elderly fan is feeling faint on the East Concourse near Food Stall #4. Needs water and paramedic assessment.

title: Minor Fan Dispute
description: Seating assignment dispute between fans. Resolved by Stand Supervisor within 5 minutes.

title: Lost Child Reported
description: An 8-year-old child wearing a green jersey was separated from parents near North Entrance Gate 1. Wearing a green shirt, answers to 'Leo'.

title: Liquid Spill Near Wheelchair Row
description: Large soda spilled in Section 104 ADA seating access corridor. Slip hazard for crutches/wheelchairs. Needs janitorial team.

title: High Demand for Wheelchair Assistance
description: Sudden arrival of shuttle buses carrying PWD fans has depleted the immediate supply of wheel-chairs and guides at Gate 4 desk.

title: Stairwell Blockage
description: Fans standing in the aisles of Stairwell 3A to watch the pre-match performance, blocking egress routes.

title: NFC Scanner Malfunction
description: Scanner Lane 12 suffered network timeout. Rebooted and re-synchronized. Fully functional now.

title: Faulty Handrail Reporting
description: Section 212 accessibility ramp handrail is loose near the top platform. Needs maintenance tightening.

title: Tailgating Congestion Outer Plaza
description: Huge gathering of fans without tickets creating crowd density bottleneck at South outer bag check barrier.
